name: QRadar Audit: QRadar Host Unavailable
notes: This rule monitors QRadar Managed hosts status.
conditions_text: when the event QID is one of the following (38750003) Information Message
when the event matches System Status (custom) matches any of expressions [UNKNOWN or FAILED]
when at least 8 events are seen with the same Source IP, System Status (custom) in 5 minutes
thresholds: when at least 8 events are seen with the same Source IP, System Status (custom) in 5 minutes
TD_list: APPLY QRadar Audit: QRadar Host Unavailable on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event QID is one of the following (38750003) Information Message
AND when the event matches System Status (custom) matches any of expressions [UNKNOWN or FAILED]
AND when at least 8 events are seen with the same Source IP, System Status (custom) in 5 minutes
RED_list: This event / flow will be propagated to the 'System Notifications' item in the dashboard, AND use event severity for notification severity
